items.headline: Rumfield gets first-place votes in latest ROY poll

news_items.headline: Twins acquire reliever Nance in trade with Blue Jays (source)
Phillies' Schwarber latest Home Run Derby add
news_items.summary: Phillies slugger Kyle Schwarber was added to the Home Run Derby on Friday, joining teammate Bryce Harper for Monday's event in Philadelphia.

news_items.headline: Source: MLB reduces Contreras ban to 5 games
news_items.summary: Red Sox slugger Willson Contreras had his suspension reduced from seven games to five, and he will be able to participate in the All-Star Game and Home Run Derby.

news_items.headline: Twins reinstate C Jeffers from IL after 2-months
news_items.summary: The Twins, seeking to bolster their bullpen, are acquiring right-handed reliever Tommy Nance from the Blue Jays for minor league catcher/third baseman Ryan Sprock, sources told ESPN.

news_items.headline: Valencia honors Venezuela after HR in MLB debut
news_items.summary: Eduardo Valencia made history Thursday with a home run in his first plate appearance for the Tigers, then got emotional while thanking his family and home country of earthquake-rocked Venezuela.

news_items.headline: Murakami set to return for the White Sox Friday
news_items.summary: Munetaka Murakami was reinstated from the IL by the White Sox on Friday after being sidelined by a strained right hamstring.

news_items.headline: Athletics' Gelof exits after colliding with fence
news_items.summary: Athletics outfielder Zack Gelof will undergo an MRI on Friday after injuring his knee sliding into the left field fence in foul territory in the third inning of Thursday's loss to the Tigers.

news_items.headline: Volpe denies 'BS' report that he refused SS move
news_items.summary: Yankees shortstop Anthony Volpe strongly denied a report that he refused to play second base earlier this season, saying he was caught "off guard" by the since-retracted report, which he called "B.S."

news_items.headline: Tommy Nance Traded to Minnesota
news_items.summary: The Blue Jays have traded right handed reliever Tommy Nance to the Minnesota Twins in exchange for A+ catcher Ryan Sprock: Nance has been with the organization for two years, after being acquired from the Padres in the middle of the 2024 season. He filled innings capably down the stretch in that lost season, and […]

news_items.headline: Shohei Ohtani injury costs Dodgers star MLB All-Star Game appearance. The latest
news_items.summary: Dodgers star Shohei Ohtani to miss the 2026 MLB All-Star Game after being scratched from his July 10 start due to injury. Here's the latest.

news_items.headline: Cardinals reportedly agree to an 8-year, $112.5M extension with JJ Wetherholt
news_items.summary: The reported extension buys out the rookie second baseman’s first several years of free agency.

news_items.headline: Dodgers' Shohei Ohtani won't participate in 2026 All-Star Game, pitch Friday vs. D-backs due to left knee issue
news_items.summary: Ohtani will still DH for L.A. this weekend against Arizona.

news_items.headline: Mets first baseman Mark Vientos set to miss 6-8 weeks with fractured hand
news_items.summary: Mets first baseman Mark Vientos is set to miss 6-8 weeks with a fracture in his right hand, but will not undergo surgery, per SNY MLB Insider Chelsea Janes.

news_items.headline: Ohtani out of All-Star Game, will skip turn on mound Friday night but will DH
St. Louis Cardinals sign rookie 2B JJ Wetherholt to big 8-year extension
news_items.summary: St. Louis Cadinals rookie JJ Wetherholt, ranked as the top defensive second baseman this season, has a new deal worth $112.5 million over eight years.

news_items.headline: Reds activate Ke’Bryan Hayes, place Matt McLain on injured list
news_items.summary: The Reds make a swap of struggling, oft-injured infielders.

news_items.headline: Series Preview: St Louis Cardinals Take On Atlanta Braves at Home July 10-12, ‘26
news_items.summary: The Cardinals host the Braves this weekend at Busch Stadium leading up to the All Star Break. If you haven’t heard, Jordan Walker will be in the Home Run Derby on Monday night on Netflix, AND be at the All-Star Game, as the Cardinals lone position player representative. Riley O’Brien was also added to the […]
